_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: This strong training paradigm is ideally suited to trigger robust biochemical changes in the hippocampus... Nf1+/− mice showed significant impairments in this task when ceiling performances are avoided
details: Successfully triggered robust biochemical changes including ERK and synapsin I phosphorylation in hippocampus, and detected learning impairments in Nf1+/− mice when ceiling performances were avoided
